# Actian Design System Knowledge Layer

> Federated knowledge layer for the Actian Design System 2026. Feeds the Actian DS Claude plugin (vendored snapshot) and future docs site, Storybook, and API clients. Built on Zen Design System primitives.

This index follows the [llmstxt.org spec](https://llmstxt.org). For agents reading this autonomously: every `.md` file is fetchable as raw markdown via `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/<path>`. The repo organizes editable source under `src/` and CI-generated artifacts under `dist/` (visible folder boundary, not frontmatter flags).

## Foundations

- [foundations/src/foundations.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/foundations/src/foundations.md): Master reference (Kristina, MD-as-SoT) — primitives, tokens, scales, status emojis (✅ current, ⚠️ proposed, ❌ deprecated, 🚧 in-progress)
- [foundations/src/AUTHORING.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/foundations/src/AUTHORING.md): How designers edit foundations.md
- [foundations/dist/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/foundations/dist/README.md): Index of 8 derived JSONs (color, borders, spacing, typography, elevation, motion, icons, breakpoint-grid)

## Tokens

- [tokens/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/tokens/README.md): Why this domain is interim-flat (frozen until successor generator)
- [tokens/token-reference.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/tokens/token-reference.md): Auto-generated human-readable token catalog

## Components

- [components/src/guidelines/AUTHORING.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/components/src/guidelines/AUTHORING.md): Stub-flip ritual for curating component guidelines
- [components/dist/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/components/dist/README.md): Index of CI-generated registries + style MDs
- [components/dist/text-styles.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/components/dist/text-styles.md): DS Kit text style catalog
- [components/dist/effect-styles.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/components/dist/effect-styles.md): DS Kit effect (shadow, blur) style catalog

## Content guidelines

- [content/content.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/content/content.md): UI copy rules — sentence case, action verbs, error messages, empty states (Jeff)

## Accessibility

- [accessibility/accessibility.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/accessibility/accessibility.md): WCAG 2.2 AA guidance for the Actian DS

## Presentation

- [presentation/presentation-guide.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/presentation/presentation-guide.md): Slide templates, content guidelines, and data-viz rules for `/generate-presentation`

## How to edit

- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): src/+dist/ convention; edit-here / never-edit table; per-domain authoring pointers
- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/README.md): Repo overview + content table

## Optional

- [components/src/guidelines/_index.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/components/src/guidelines/_index.json): Component coverage index (84 components; `_stub: true` flags placeholders)
- [components/src/guidelines/](https://github.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/tree/main/components/src/guidelines): 85 per-component JSON files (44 hand-curated + 41 stubs as of 2026-05-10) — droppable under tight token budgets
- [components/dist/registries/dskit.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/components/dist/registries/dskit.json): DS Kit registry (322 components, Figma-synced)
- [components/dist/registries/fmkit.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/components/dist/registries/fmkit.json): FM (wireframe) Kit registry
- [components/dist/registries/metakit.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/components/dist/registries/metakit.json): Meta Kit registry (hybrid — `templates` block hand-curated)
- [tokens/tokens.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/tokens/tokens.json): DTCG W3C-format design tokens (frozen snapshot)
- [tokens/tokens.css](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/tokens/tokens.css): CSS custom properties (`--zen-*`)
- [app-context/app-context.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/app-context/app-context.json): Per-app patterns + persona + terminology
- [fm-to-ds-map/fm-to-ds-map.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/volivarii/actian-ds-knowledge/main/fm-to-ds-map/fm-to-ds-map.json): FM Kit → DS Kit component mapping for hifi conversion

## Instructions

When fetching content from this repo programmatically, prefer the `.md` files in `src/` (human-authored, narrative) for reasoning about intent, design decisions, and rules. Use the `dist/*.json` files (CI-generated) for structured data lookups (token values, component keys, variant axes). Files marked frozen (`_frozen: true` in JSON or "FROZEN" in headers) are interim manual snapshots — flag if you find drift between them and the actual Figma source.
